current.next_action: Verify the rebuilt online-order flow with one real action in adonis.pro/admin/orders: confirm Sydney Barill (she paid → click Confirmed) and optionally send Mikah Banda a payment reminder (unpaid). Then place one real test checkout on adonis.pro to confirm the Zelle/Apple Pay instructions screen + customer email. STANDING PRIORITIES (unchanged): (1) Take visitor-recovery engine live — review a day of dry-run data at adonis.pro/admin/visitors, set RECOVERY_LIVE=true on advnce-site Vercel + redeploy. (2) Ambassador recruitment drip — 823 leads, batch 2026-05-30-solar-prod, set next_send_at=now to launch; confirm ADVNCE_ORIGIN, EMAIL_UNSUB_SECRET, RESEND_API_KEY, CRON_SECRET on Vercel. Optional: backfill existing N/A item sizes in old order rows (display already auto-corrects via SKU lookup).
completed_today: Fixed /admin/visitors dashboard showing 0 while the recovery engine had 81 events — RLS silently blanks anon-key reads (no error). New cookie-gated server route app/api/admin/visitors (service key, requireRole admin); page now fetches it instead of the browser anon client. Verified live: unauthenticated = 401 with zero data; engine confirmed capturing a full real purchase trail (add_to_cart→identify→checkout_start).

Wrote portable visitor-recovery build prompt at Ai Projects/Docs/visitor-recovery-engine-portable-prompt.md — self-contained prompt to replicate the engine in any portfolio project; encodes the RLS, read-back-verification, and RECOVERY_LIVE dry-run gotchas. Memory pointer added.
_completed_2026_06_09: Fixed online ordering end-to-end. adonis.pro storefront checkout was silently losing orders (stub Stripe webhook + wrong-schema client insert gated to logged-in users only). Rebuilt submitOrder -> new /api/place-order (service-key insert, RLS-safe, GUEST-capable) writing pending_payment in the admin orders schema; on-screen Zelle/Apple Pay instructions overlay (pay 626-806-4475 / Jorrel Patterson) replacing the Stripe redirect; new /api/notify-customer payment-instructions email. Removed dead /api/stripe + /api/checkout. Pro/Elite buy.stripe.com links untouched.

Fixed admin order visibility: orders table RLS blocks the anon key, so admin Orders page showed 0 of 37 real orders. Added admin service-key routes /api/orders-list + /api/order-status; wired app/admin/orders to them (was direct anon fetch/PATCH). Added /api/shipping-confirm (Send & Ship saves tracking + emails customer; previously only existed in advnce-site repo so the button 404d). Added /api/payment-reminder (re-sendable Zelle/Apple Pay reminder email) with a button on pending_payment AND sent-invoice rows.

Customer emails now show real item strength (mg): lib/enrichItemSizes.js backfills size from the products catalog by SKU when an order saved size N/A; wired into /api/orders-list (admin display + shipped email) and /api/payment-reminder; hides blank/N/A as last resort. Root cause fixed in advnce-site advnce-product.html (add-to-cart had no size selector, fell back to N/A) -> now stores p.size. Deployed advncelabs.com.

Orders page: sent invoices now count + filter as Pending Payment (were drawing the amber badge via fallback but counted as 1 of 4); added green Paid badge so paid invoices stop looking pending; order-status accepts sent/paid. Design spec + plan in docs/superpowers/ (2026-06-09-zelle-applepay-checkout). All shipped to production across adonis-next + advnce-site.
_completed_2026_06_06: Fixed compound-spotlight email restock drafts mapping by raw order code instead of compound name (commit 59a5278). Root cause: onStockRise looked up compound_marketing by its sku column, which is unpopulated — e.g. PT-141's product SKU 'PT10' leaked as the draft name with a blank hook. Now resolves product by SKU → matches compound_marketing by name/slug → falls back to product name, never the raw code.
Backfilled the IP10 restock draft → Ipamorelin (name, slug, hook, GROWTH HORMONE label, RAUN 1998 citation; body left null for ✨ Generate).
Deleted two redundant restock orphan drafts: NP8 (duplicated an already-authored Snap-8 draft) and HGH (not in the campaign md, no marketing copy).
CLAUDE.md — formalized the 'save everything' end-of-session ritual (commit + jorrel-os.json merge update + os.jorrel.io card refresh).
_completed_2026_06_02: lib/requireAdmin.js — admin-cookie auth helper; applied to 6 /api/* routes in adonis-next (ambassador-welcome, ambassador-message, ambassador-payout, ambassador-write, ambassador-content-digest, discount-code-write)

Schema migration 2026-04-23_ambassadors_commissions_rpc.sql — CREATE IF NOT EXISTS for ambassadors + referral_commissions + new ambassador_payouts + RPC drop/create-with-defaults + ALTER orders ADD ref_code. Applied to prod.
ambassador-content-digest filter fix (active → status=eq.active) — was returning 0 ambassadors every call, so digest never sent
ambassador-write validation — status field (active/paused/banned), email regex, phone normalize to 10-digit, name 1–120 chars
ambassador-message HTML escape — message/name/code all escaped before template insertion (defense in depth; admin-only after auth gate)
ambassador-payout hardening — requires ambassador.id UUID, inserts ambassador_payouts audit row, returns 409-as-warning on duplicate period
discount-code-write soft delete — delete action now PATCHes active=false instead of DELETE (preserves audit trail)
ADMIN_EMAIL env var — adonis-next/ambassador-welcome, advnce-site/send-order-email, advnce-site/ambassador-notify all read from process.env.ADMIN_EMAIL with jorrelpatterson@gmail.com fallback

Admin /admin/ambassadors UI — status pill (green/amber/red), Pause/Resume button (hidden for banned), Last-payout column (period + total), confirm dialog if payout period already paid, dead IIFE removed

scripts/smoke-ambassador-flow.js — e2e integration test: first-ambassador (15% discount + commission), repeat customer (tier rate, no discount), promo code (used_count increment). All 3 green against prod.
Both repos pushed to main. adonis-next: 12 new commits (spec + plan + code). advnce-site: 1 commit (ADMIN_EMAIL).
_completed_2026_04_21: Multi-Vendor Order Sheet at /admin/purchases/multi — auto-routes to cheapest vendor, per-row + bulk override, summary panel, splits into multi-PO on submit
Per-vendor PO catalog: rows where another vendor is cheaper now dim with '↓ Vendor $XX' subtitle
Storefront product page: OOS items show 'This ships in 2-3 weeks' (amber) and Add-to-Order stays enabled (was hard-blocking)
Renamed BBG Blend → 'Glow Plus' and GLOW50 Blend → 'Glow' across products table + Adonis app catalog (app.html, public/app.html, lib/constants/peptides.js)

SQL migration: 2026-04-21_ensure_all_products_visible.sql — INSERTs 97 products from vendor JSONs (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING) + UPDATEs active=true. Fixes Adipotide, AICAR, Melatonin 10mg, 5-Amino-1MQ etc.
SQL migration: 2026-04-21_backfill_vendor_prices_for_orphan_products.sql — 80 vendor_prices rows added across Eve/Weak/Rosyy for the 48 SKUs that had our_sku=null in JSONs
One-off SQL: hid 5 truly orphan products (CI10, BT100, DH10, GC200, NA300) via UPDATE active=false
Multi-vendor sheet: removed active=false filter so admin sees all products (Lemon Bottle, Botox, etc.) with HIDDEN badge inline. Storefront still respects active=false.
InfoIcon component (lib/constants/peptide-explanations.js) — React state-based tooltip on ? icons, 75 compounds with layman 'what you notice' explanations. Used in both order sheet pages.
Pricing audit: identified Weak strictly cheapest on 18 SKUs (CagriSema -$35, Dermorphin -$19, Kisspeptin-10 -$14 lead the savings list). Top Rosyy savings: VP10 (-$19), G10K (-$17), MC40 (-$15).
Vendor cell on inventory page now shows cheapest vendor + LOF (last ordered from) subtitle. Cost columns split into Kit $ + Vial $ derived from kit ÷ 10.
3 specs written under docs/superpowers/specs/: 2026-04-19-oos-shipping-copy-design, 2026-04-21-po-cheaper-elsewhere-dim-design, 2026-04-21-multi-vendor-order-sheet-design

Discount codes + ambassador lifetime attribution shipped (cross-repo) — discount_codes + customer_attribution tables, /api/discount-code-write CRUD, /admin/discount-codes page, attribution lookup + commission with first-sale bonus in send-order-email, discount/attribution badges on /admin/orders, Attributed tab on /admin/ambassadors. _completed_2026_06_07: Built first-party visitor recovery engine on advnce-site (advncelabs.com) — Opensend-style anonymous-visitor→email recovery, in-house. Pixel track.js sitewide (15 pages), /api/track ingest to Supabase (hashed IP), /api/cron/recovery 15-min cron (abandoned-checkout 30m + cart 60m triggers), self-contained opt-out (/api/unsubscribe + email_optout + /unsubscribe.html), inert resolveStranger() stub for future paid identity-graph. 14 node:test unit tests. Gated behind RECOVERY_LIVE (default dry-run — sends zero emails). Spec+plan in advnce-site/docs/superpowers/. Merged feat/visitor-recovery-engine→main, deployed live.

4 new Supabase tables applied manually (visitors, visitor_events, recovery_sends, email_optout). IP_HASH_SALT set on advnce-site Vercel (Production). Live endpoints verified: /track.js 200, /api/track {ok:true}, cron {live:false}.

Built /admin/visitors dashboard on adonis-next (adonis.pro/admin) — read-only: summary tiles, dry-run/live banner, recovery candidates, identified visitors, recent activity feed. Added Visitors nav item. Build passed, pushed, deployed (auth-gated 307→login verified).

roadmap_ideas.title: Patch vendor JSON files to set our_sku for the 48 entries currently mapped null
roadmap_ideas.summary: DB-level fix is done via backfill migration. But the JSONs at docs/vendors/{eve,weak,rosyy}-pricing.json still have our_sku=null on 48 entries. If ever re-seeded the gap returns. Mapping is straightforward: match by name+size to existing products.sku.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Write a Python script that updates the JSON files in place using products name+size → sku lookup. Single PR.

roadmap_ideas.title: Discount OOS items to crowdfund 10-vial POs
roadmap_ideas.summary: OOS items show heavy discount price + 'extended wait time' framing; orders queue until enough cash to fund a 10-vial PO. Storefront already shows 'This ships in 2-3 weeks' for OOS items as of 2026-04-21, so the UX path is lighter — just need discount pricing + queue-to-PO threshold logic.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Brainstorming session — start by deciding which open question matters most (discount depth vs framing vs fulfillment risk).

roadmap_ideas.title: Decide whether dashboard surfaces both 'actual paid' and 'replacement cost' wholesale
roadmap_ideas.summary: Inventory Wholesale uses paid cost basis (PO unit_cost) where known, falls back to products.cost (cheapest vendor). Could add a separate 'Replacement Wholesale' card to make the gap explicit.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Wait until cost basis vs replacement gap actually causes confusion in practice; revisit if Jorrel asks again.

roadmap_ideas.title: Decide whether to DELETE the 5 hidden orphan products (CI10, BT100, DH10, GC200, NA300)
roadmap_ideas.summary: CI10 + BT100 are likely duplicates of CJCI10 + BOTU100. DH10 (Dihexa), GC200 (GHK-Cu 200mg), NA300 (NAD+ 300mg) have no vendor JSON entry. All hidden via UPDATE active=false on 2026-04-21.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Leave hidden for a few weeks; if no vendor surfaces and no PO references found, run DELETE. Cascades will clean up vendor_prices automatically (ON DELETE CASCADE).

roadmap_ideas.title: Cron the welcome 2/3 emails (currently manual)
roadmap_ideas.summary: subscribe-welcome-2 and subscribe-welcome-3 are manual triggers. At low subscriber volume this is fine; at scale needs Vercel cron + Supabase 'last_sent' tracking on subscribers table.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Defer until subscriber volume justifies the cron+state work.

roadmap_ideas.title: Migrate transactional emails to cream brand palette
roadmap_ideas.summary: PO confirmation, order confirmation, ambassador welcome still use dark navy (legacy from Elysian branding). Should match advnce labs cream + cyan + amber identity.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Batch all three transactional templates in one pass when ready for visual polish.

roadmap_ideas.title: Botox/Botulinum legal review before activation
roadmap_ideas.summary: BOTU100 hidden on storefront. BT100 hidden as orphan duplicate on 2026-04-21. Schedule 1 Select Agent + Rx-only. Need attorney review before exposing.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Engage legal counsel; estimate ~$500-1500 for opinion letter.

roadmap_ideas.title: Subscription model: customers commit to monthly volume for discount
roadmap_ideas.status: captured (in OOS idea memory), not scoped
roadmap_ideas.summary: Smooth out PO cadence by giving subscribers a discount in exchange for committing to monthly volume. Adjacent to the OOS pre-sell idea — both convert future demand into present cash flow.

roadmap_ideas.title: Wholesale ambassador kits — front cash for inventory at wholesale, sell at retail
roadmap_ideas.status: captured (in OOS idea memory), not scoped
roadmap_ideas.summary: Ambassadors front cash for a starter kit at wholesale prices, then sell at retail and keep the margin. Bigger lever than commission program but riskier (compliance, customer support burden, reputation if mishandled).

roadmap_ideas.title: Decide which of the 80 hidden oral-tablet SKUs to activate (and to whom)
roadmap_ideas.summary: 81 new oral tablet SKUs from Eve's 2026-04-21 sheet sit hidden in admin: 12 anabolic steroids (Schedule III legal risk), 8 SARMs, 7 PCT/AI, 3 thyroid, 2 stimulants, 11 pharma (Sildenafil, Finasteride, etc.), 7 oral peptide forms, 2 oral GLP-1s, etc. Different audiences and legal profiles per cluster. Default retail = 2× cost (placeholder).
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Brainstorm: same site or new vertical? Start with lowest-risk additions (Methylene Blue, oral peptides, SARMs) and grow from there. Steroid tablets need legal review like Botox.

roadmap_ideas.title: Add tablets to vendor JSON source-of-truth or create separate file
roadmap_ideas.summary: docs/vendors/eve-pricing.json currently only covers peptide vials. The 81 new tablet SKUs are only in the migration. If the JSONs are ever re-run as a seed source, the tablets won't be regenerated.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Either extend eve-pricing.json with a 'tablets' section (cleaner) or create eve-tablets.json (more granular). One-time data extraction from the migration file.

roadmap_ideas.title: Live discount preview on checkout cart summary
roadmap_ideas.summary: Currently customer only sees the discount on the success/email screen. Could pre-validate the code on blur and show '−$X (CODE)' in the cart summary live.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: When time permits, add an /api/validate-code endpoint and wire onChange/onBlur of the code input to it.

roadmap_ideas.title: Refund / commission-reversal workflow
roadmap_ideas.summary: If an order is canceled or refunded, the referral_commissions row needs reversal. Currently manual via Supabase. Should add a 'Refund' button on /admin/orders that reverses commissions atomically.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Add a /api/order-refund endpoint that updates order status + creates a commission-reversal entry.

roadmap_ideas.title: Per-phone one-use limit on promo codes
roadmap_ideas.summary: Currently promo codes have a global usage_limit only. Could add per-phone enforcement (e.g., LAUNCH25 can only be used once per phone, even if not at the global limit).
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Add a (code, phone) uniqueness check in send-order-email before applying the discount.

roadmap_ideas.title: Add Eve tablets to vendor JSON or create a separate eve-tablets.json
roadmap_ideas.summary: Migration captured the 81 tablet SKUs in the DB but the JSON source-of-truth (docs/vendors/eve-pricing.json) is peptide-vials-only. If the JSON is ever re-run as a seed source, the tablets won't be regenerated.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Extract tablet data from the migration into a structured JSON. One-time data work.

roadmap_ideas.title: Set up info@advncelabs.com forwarding and flip ADMIN_EMAIL
roadmap_ideas.summary: Admin notification emails (new ambassador signups, new orders, admin flags) currently go to jorrelpatterson@gmail.com via ADMIN_EMAIL env var default. Code is already threaded — just need the mailbox. No Google Workspace set up.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Cloudflare Email Routing is free and takes ~10 minutes if advncelabs.com DNS is on Cloudflare; otherwise most registrars (Porkbun, Namecheap) offer free forwarding built-in. Once forwarding works, set ADMIN_EMAIL=info@advncelabs.com on both Vercel projects (adonis-next + advnce-site). No redeploy needed — env vars propagate.

roadmap_ideas.title: Migrate admin writes from SERVICE_KEY proxy to proper Supabase JWT + RLS
roadmap_ideas.summary: Today's auth gate (lib/requireAdmin cookie check on API routes) closes the attack surface for admin-only API routes. But the writes themselves still use SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY server-side. A cleaner architecture would be: admin authenticates via Supabase Auth → gets JWT → client calls Supabase REST directly with that JWT → RLS policies gate writes. Bigger rewrite but eliminates the 'route uses service key behind cookie' pattern entirely.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Week-of-work refactor. Low priority — cookie gate is adequate while admin is solo-operated.

roadmap_ideas.title: Rate-limit /api/ambassador-* endpoints
roadmap_ideas.summary: After the cookie gate (today), only authenticated admins can hit these routes, so abuse vector is self-abuse (accidental double-clicks spamming welcome emails). Once admin count grows beyond 1, re-evaluate.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Add Upstash Redis or similar; per-route sliding window. Out of scope while single-admin.

roadmap_ideas.title: Implement Stripe webhook signature verification
roadmap_ideas.summary: app/api/stripe/route.js in adonis-next has signature verification as a TODO comment. This route is for adonis.pro subscriptions (NOT the Zelle-based ambassador order path), so it doesn't block the ambassador program. But once subscriptions go live, unverified webhooks are a real vulnerability.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Uncomment the constructEvent code + set STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var on Vercel. Add real event handlers (currently all console.log stubs).

roadmap_ideas.title: Refund / commission-reversal workflow
roadmap_ideas.summary: Duplicate of commission-reversal-flow above — keeping for visibility. Today's smoke test confirmed the happy path but there's no workflow to reverse attribution/commissions when an order is canceled.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Add /api/order-refund that marks order status=refunded + inserts negative referral_commissions rows + decrements ambassador totals.

setup.next_setup_action: Optional: Create ROADMAP.md if a formal roadmap doc is desired. roadmap_ideas[] in this file is the working list.
